Description: Banco Inter payment integration for Umbraco. Supports Pix (immediate and due charges), Boleto com Pix, Banking (outbound Pix, boleto payments, balance/statement), and webhook handling. Supports Umbraco 13 (net8.0) and Umbraco 17 (net10.0).

AuthorDetails.Name: SplatDev
AuthorDetails.Description: SplatDev Ltda — building Umbraco plugins and tools for agencies and developers.
